title: Tao Te Ching 21
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 21 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 21 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The grandest forms of active force from Tao arise. What is Tao? It is something elusive and evasive.
